raw_consumer_statement: The charges made on this account were not made or authorized by me. I have disputed these charges before, and I will continue to dispute these charges until they are removed from this account and my credit file. I have over one dozen card accounts all of which I pay on time or before time. In review of my credit report, you will find that the average age of the accounts is 8 years and that I have a 100 % payment history of on time or before time. The only exceptions to this fact are those accounts wherein I dispute certain unknown or unauthorized charges.
